title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Meesho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Meesho. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Meesho:
Meesho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho!
